name: 短剑（★） | 夜色
descriptionEn: Historically a focal point of contention and even regulation, this Italian-style stiletto switchblade knife features a spring-loaded blade that can be deployed almost instantly with the push of a release catch. It has been spray-painted with a tape mask pattern in a night ops color scheme. Spray... Pray... Paint... Stab.
descriptionZh: 作为历史上舆论乃至法规的讨论焦点，这把配备着弹簧加压刀刃的意大利短剑可以在按下开关的瞬间弹出到位。 这把武器以黑夜配色的纸带图案进行了喷漆。 喷绘... 渲染... 上色... 刺杀。
